name: obsid-studio-site
description: OBSID-Studio - Local-first AI Creative OS Landing Page

scripts.minify: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js && npm run minify:html
scripts.minify:html: html-minifier --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --minify-js --minify-css index.html -o index.min.html && mv index.min.html index.html

author: Florian HFK
